no: Storm Caller shaman kit by Ulb. Summons lightning storms through ritualistic dance. Single-class shaman kit with unique spells and abilities.

conflicts.reason: A7 Improved Shamanic Dance scans kitlist.2da and patches all shaman kits. Install StormCaller BEFORE A7 Shamanic Dance.

passive.desc: Shamanic Dance calls lightning instead of summoning spirits. Enemies in 30' have 12%+2%/lvl chance (max 50%) to be struck each round. Damage: 2d6 (lv1), 4d6 (lv6), 6d6 (lv12), 8d6 (lv18), 10d6 (lv24) electrical.

activated.effects: 30' radius aura: enemies have 5%/round chance of 10d6 electrical strike.

restrictions.armor: Leather, studded leather, hide only. Bucklers only.
restrictions.items: Cannot cast: Spirit Ward, Spiritual Clarity, Spirit Fire, Recall Spirit, Spiritual Lock, Ether Gate. Gains Writhing Fog at lv3.

hlaPool.note: Adds Lightning Mastery (5x stackable) and Improved Storm Aura HLAs

new: Shaman channeling storm spirits. Lightning and thunder shamanic abilities.

sum: A shaman kit that summons lightning storms from the elemental plane of air through ritualistic dance.

co.no: Adds the Storm Caller shaman kit with lightning-themed abilities and Shamanic Dance variants.
